Site Visit Report

ProjectOudin
DateJuly 18, 2026
Prepared ForOudin
Prepared ByJuliette Calaf Interiors

Kitchen

Panel above the refrigerator has been installed.
Interior motion activated lights are installed. Three additional lights will be left on site to swap while others are charging.

Victor's Room

Headboard is fixed to the wall and outlets are installed. Light switches with charger are ordered and will be installed upon arrival. All elements will align perfectly at completion.

Laundry

Washer and dryer have been tested. Completed.

Throughout

The entire home has been conditioned for all currently installed millwork. Carla's closet and headboard will be conditioned upon arrival of the wood veneer.

Garage

One garage light is installed. The dimmer switch is scheduled to be changed to a regular switch. The second light will be installed once the garage door work is complete.
